breadth_formula.decision_source_ts: underlying base-event decision_ts minus five minutes; selects the completed source-bar timestamp in the Stage14 panel
breadth_formula.denominator: eligible PF count at decision_source_ts after lifecycle/trade/mark/analytics masks
breadth_formula.direction_field: parent_direction; negative=-1, positive=+1; trade_direction is not used because completed reversal negates it
breadth_formula.feature_available_ts: decision_source_ts plus five minutes, exactly equal to underlying base-event decision_ts
breadth_formula.numerator: count distinct completed-purge base_event_id onsets passing identity and parent_direction filters in interval

causal_reclaim.availability: source_close_ts plus five minutes equals feature_available_ts equals decision_ts
causal_reclaim.confirmation_bar: first completed 5m bar after onset on which trade_close>=trade_reference and mark_close>=mark_reference
causal_reclaim.decision_ts: confirmation source_close_ts plus five minutes availability
causal_reclaim.lookback: one completed 5m bar; missing or noncontiguous reference rejects
causal_reclaim.reference_timestamp: last completed contiguous 5m bar strictly before downside episode onset

episode_identity.close: first completed causal reclaim or expiry strictly after onset+6h
episode_identity.flicker: once open, predicate flicker neither closes nor creates a new episode
episode_identity.mandatory_component_timing: all required primitives must be true on the same completed source bar; delayed OI/liquidation/basis activation delays onset
episode_identity.onset: first completed 5m bar on which every cell-required pre-reclaim primitive is true after a rearm bar
episode_identity.reference_binding: reference prices are taken immediately before this exact onset
episode_identity.reset: after reclaim/expiry, require one completed bar with at least one mandatory pre-reclaim primitive false before another all-true false-to-true onset

instrument_mapping.rule: native PF symbol of downside completed-rejection event

side_mapping.rule: long after completed downside trade-and-mark structural rejection/reclaim
